security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: blob:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; connect-src 'self' http://localhost:* http://127.0.0.1:* ws://localhost:* ws://127.0.0.1:* https://api.github.com; frame-src http://localhost:* http://127.0.0.1:* https://*.vercel.app; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'none'
